findings.description: Extra closing brace added in this diff creates invalid JSON. Helm schema validation will fail for all chart users. Flagged in 3 prior re-reviews and unresolved.
Duplicate clusterInventory: key introduced by the diff. Strict YAML parsers error; lenient parsers silently drop the bare entry. Flagged in 3 prior re-reviews and unresolved.
Two merge-main commits (37c37067, f65051b8) still in branch. Project convention requires rebase before merge.
Commits 1d1bb7fa and da9888f1 have vague subjects 'Address Copilot review comments' without describing what changed. Flagged in every re-review since 2026-05-27.
Commit deecfffb missing SubArea; commit a8f8d966 uses non-standard area prefix 'cluster-inventory' and lowercase verb.
CACert: &oidcCACert passes pointer to empty string when no cert configured, breaking nil-as-absence convention. No functional regression today but fragile for future callers.
Package-level godoc comment and Options struct field comments were removed; retain them for contributor orientation.
Unnecessary forward-slash escape in pattern: "^\/" should be "^/" in JSON schema.
if ('oidcAutoLogin' in action.payload) guard correctly distinguishes explicit false from omitted key in partial setConfig calls.
Clean disambiguation of popup flow (localStorage signal) vs full-page redirect flow (sessionStorage clear + history.replace) using window.opener.
Three targeted tests give precise coverage of the oidcAutoLogin payload guard logic.
TestGetConfigIncludesOidcAutoLogin validates end-to-end serialisation of new field through getConfig handler.
